title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't take orders from you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Haredas!! I need to see Haredas- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll give you it all back, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm not going to try anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Just let me out of here, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Mr. Haredas!! Mr. Haredas, please respond!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: What is all this so suddenly?!
